calculations.description: Monthly EB bill / 7 = monthly units. Units / 120 = kW required. kW × 65000 = estimated cost.

faqs.question: How much does solar installation cost?
faqs.answer: Solar system costs approximately ₹60,000–₹75,000 per kW. A typical 3 kW home system costs around ₹1.95 lakh before subsidy. After PM Surya Ghar subsidy, you save ₹30,000–₹78,000.

faqs.question: How much can I save on EB bill?
faqs.answer: Solar can reduce your EB bill by 80–95%. A 3 kW system generates about 360 units/month, saving approx ₹2,500–₹3,500 per month depending on your tariff. Payback period is typically 4–5 years.

faqs.question: Is government subsidy available?
faqs.answer: Yes! Under PM Surya Ghar Yojana: Up to 3 kW: ₹30,000–₹78,000 subsidy. Above 3 kW: Additional benefits. We handle all subsidy paperwork at no extra charge.

faqs.question: How long will solar panels last?
faqs.answer: Quality solar panels last 25–30 years with proper maintenance. We use Tata, Adani, and Loom Solar panels that come with 25-year performance warranty and 10-year product warranty.

faqs.question: What maintenance is required?
faqs.answer: Solar systems need minimal maintenance: monthly cleaning of panels, annual inverter checkup. We offer AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract) starting from ₹2,000/year covering cleaning, inspection, and minor repairs.

faqs.question: Can solar work during power cuts?
faqs.answer: It depends on the system type. Off-grid and hybrid systems with batteries work during power cuts. On-grid systems stop during power cuts (safety regulation). For 24/7 power, we recommend a hybrid system.

faqs.question: How much space is needed?
faqs.answer: Approximately 10 sq ft per panel. A 3 kW system needs about 200–250 sq ft of rooftop space. We do a free site inspection to confirm your roof's suitability.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard residential installation takes 1–3 days. Commercial systems may take 3–7 days. After payment, we complete survey to commissioning in under 2 weeks.

faqs.question: Do you provide EMI options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible EMI options through our banking partners. 0% EMI for 12 months available on select plans. Contact us for customized financing.

faqs.question: What warranty do you provide?
faqs.answer: Panel: 25 years performance + 10 years product warranty. Inverter: 5 years warranty. Battery: 3–5 years warranty. Our workmanship warranty: 2 years on installation.

greetings.tamil: வணக்கம்! நான் KI Bharath Solar-இன் AI உதவியாளர். சோலார் பற்றி எந்த கேள்வியும் கேளுங்கள்!
